/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fsanitize=undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/logmind-client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/dbus_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/main_window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/models/log_model.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/models/log_filter_model.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/log_view.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/search_bar.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/plugin_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/alert_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/status_bar_widget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/log_detail_panel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/widgets/dashboard_widget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-client.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_resources.cpp.o" -o logmind-client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
